title: Grimace Mod
body:
New mod from TheKrepe! And he adds a sensational Grimace! There is also grimace meat in fashion, a record with the song Grimace - CG5 and Grimace Shake!

To summon Grimace you need to drink Grimace Shake!

Grimace EXE with a small chance summoning in the world!

EXE Shard can be used as a decoration for armor

Other Links:
- 
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grimace-mod-thekrepe)
